case_title: AUTO WORLD COLLISION VS. JOAQUIN CASTRO ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY AUTO WORLD COLLISION AS TO DEFENDANT CASTRO, JOAQUIN TOYOTA LEASE TRUST ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-11-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTO WORLD COLLISION

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-11-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON BOTH DEFENDANTS TO APR-30-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY SUSIE RAVETTI--OFFICE MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION RE: RESET OF HEARING DATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTO WORLD COLLISION
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-24-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF APR-30-2015 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON BOTH DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
DECLARATION RE: RESET OF TRIAL DATE FOR NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTO WORLD COLLISION
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-22-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-22-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR, CASE WAS DISMISSED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION
